properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Drizzt is not unlocked with this skin. Drizzt can only be unlocked by completing Overdue Rendezvous - the first Variant of the Underdeep Cartography adventure in the A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast Campaign.

backstory.original: Despite his increasing fame (or infamy) across the Sword Coast North as a drow who dwells on the surface, is deadly in battle, fights with great agility and two enchanted scimitars, and can call on an onyx panther figurine of wondrous power to bring a battle companion to his side, Drizzt Do'Urden remains an enigma. Thoughtful and sensitive to others, Drizzt holds himself to the highest ideals but does not expect the same of others. Ever alert for treachery and danger, he speaks little but is apt to be polite (if terse) in his dealings. A perfectionist who yearns to be accepted into places and groups and to make friends widely, Drizzt is haunted by the danger he brings to those he befriends thanks to the scrutiny of Lolth and his other foes (notably the demon Errtu and the human Artemis Entreri). Those he meets see his manner as grim.
backstory.display: 尽管在整个剑湾北部名声大噪（或者是声名狼藉），作为一个居住在地表的卓尔精灵，他在战斗中仍然无比致命。他依靠卓越的敏捷和两把魔法弯刀战斗，还能使用神奇的玛瑙豹雕像，将战斗伙伴召唤到他身边。崔斯特·杜垩登始终是个谜一样的人物，他深思熟虑，对别人很敏感，以最高的理想标准要求自己，但并不期望别人也这样做。他对背叛和危险总是保持警惕，在与人打交道时却很有礼貌（尽管话语简练）。崔斯特是个完美主义者，他渴望被地方和团体所接受，也希望能广交朋友。由于罗丝以及其他敌人（特别是恶魔厄图和人类阿尔忒弥斯·恩崔立）的监视，他给他的朋友们带来了危险，这使他感到不安。在他遇到的人看来，他始终严肃而冷酷。

description.original: Drizzt attacks the nearest enemy with his scimitar Icingdeath.
description.display: 崔斯特用弯刀“冰亡”攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Drizzt attacks in a whirl of steel, continuing his attack until his sharpened blades don't kill an enemy in one hit.
description.display: 崔斯特用一道钢铁的旋风攻击敌人，持续发动攻击直到他的利刃不再能一击杀死敌人为止。

longDescription.original: Drizzt attacks in a whirl of steel, continuing his attack until his sharpened blades don't kill an enemy in one hit.
longDescription.display: 崔斯特用一道钢铁的旋风攻击敌人，持续发动攻击直到他的利刃不再能一击杀死敌人为止。

description.desc: Drizzt's attacks have a 25% chance to summon Guenhwyvar to fight by his side for 30 seconds. Guenhwyvar attacks twice and deals the same damage as Drizzt and causes a 20 second bleed.
崔斯特的攻击有 25% 几率召唤关海法，在 30 秒内协助他作战。关海法会攻击两次，造成与崔斯特相同的伤害，并附加持续 20 秒的流血

tipText.original: Drizzt regularily summons his panther companion, Guenhwyvar, to aid in battle with vicious bleed attacks.
tipText.display: 崔斯特不时召唤黑豹伙伴关海法，通过凶残的流血攻击协助战斗。

description.desc: When Drizzt attacks an enemy bleeding from Guenhwyvar with Icingdeath, he does $amount% more damage, and his next Base Attack cooldown is reduced by $(not_buffed cooldown___2)%
崔斯特用冰亡弯刀攻击被关海法附加流血的敌人时，造成 $amount% 额外伤害，并且他下一次基本攻击的冷却时间缩减 $(not_buffed cooldown___2)%
When Drizzt attacks an enemy bleeding from Guenhwyvar with Twinkle, he does AOE damage to nearby enemies, and the original target has a $amount___2% chance to miss their next attack
崔斯特用闪光弯刀攻击被关海法附加流血的敌人时，对附近敌人造成范围伤害，并且他最初攻击的目标有 $amount___2% 几率错失下一次攻击

tipText.original: When Drizzt attacks a target Guenhwyvar has attacked, his twin scimitars cause additional effects.
tipText.display: 崔斯特攻击关海法已攻击过的目标时，他的双刀会造成额外效果。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Mithral Hall stack. Increase Drizzt's damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Mithral Hall stack you have, stacking multiplicatively.
你的阵型获得一层秘银厅堆叠。每层秘银厅堆叠均使崔斯特的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 崔斯特秘银厅堆叠层数

description.desc: Increase Drizzt's damage by $amount% for each Companions of the Hall Champion in the formation.
阵型中的每位秘银五侠勇士均使崔斯特的伤害提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Drizzt works with the Companions to increase his damage.
specializationDescription.display: 崔斯特与五侠协作以提高他的伤害。

description.desc: Increase Drizzt's damage by $amount% for each Drow Champion in the formation.
阵型中的每位卓尔精灵勇士均使崔斯特的伤害提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Drizzt's focuses on his own martial prowess, increasing his base damage.
specializationDescription.display: 崔斯特专注于自身的武力，提高其基础伤害。

{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,11514","description":"Increases the bonus damage of Drizzt's Companions of the Hall ability by $amount%"}

description.original: Best not to start a brawl in a Menzoberranzan tavern.
description.display: 最好别在魔索布莱城的旅店里挑事。

description.original: Zaknafein taught me well.
description.display: 我从扎克纳梵那里学到了很多。

description.original: It's one of the few places that feels like home.
description.display: 这是少数几个感觉像家的地方之一。

description.original: The Companions of the Hall never want for coin.
description.display: 秘银五侠从来都不在乎钱。

description.original: This is Regis' doing, I can tell.
description.display: 这是瑞吉斯的风格，我看得出来。

description.original: If there's one thing the Drow do well, it's lead. By fear, mind you.
description.display: 如果有什么卓尔精灵擅长的事，那就是领导。请注意，是通过恐惧。

effects.description: Increases the bonus damage of Drizzt's Companions of the Hall ability by $amount%

description.original: My mother thought me too smart for my own good.
description.display: 我母亲认为我太过自作聪明。

description.original: If put in the right situation...
description.display: 在关键的时候......

description.original: Death's cold embrace will be like ice for you.
description.display: 死亡的冷酷拥抱对你来说就像寒冰一样。

description.original: You will die by either Guenhwyvar's fangs or my blade.
description.display: 要么被关海法的毒牙咬死，要么被我的剑砍死。

description.original: Hope is the ally of all courageous people.
description.display: 希望是所有勇敢者的盟友。

description.original: We make our stand - here, together!
description.display: 我们并肩站在这里，一决胜负！

description.original: I am truly blessed to know them as dear friends.
description.display: 能与他们成为挚友，是我一生所幸。

effects.description: Increases the bonus damage of Drizzt's Companions of the Hall ability by $amount%

description.original: The first scimitar I used in my training with Zaknafein.
description.display: 这是我跟扎克纳梵训练时使用过的第一把弯刀。

description.original: An instrument of death in the hands of an experienced drow warrior.
description.display: 在经验丰富的卓尔精灵战士手中，这简直是死神的镰刀。

description.original: It pulses with a soft icy glow.
description.display: 它有节奏地散发着冷冻的光芒。

description.original: Found in the treasure hoard of the white dragon Ingeloakastimizilian, better known as Icingdeath.
description.display: 这是在白龙印格罗卡斯提密齐里安的宝库中找到的。你或许听过它的另一个名称--冰亡。

description.original: A dull weapon suitable for training young Drow in the ways of battle.
description.display: 适合让年轻的卓尔精灵对练使用的迟钝武器。

description.original: A slender weapon; far more deadly than a bulky greatsword.
description.display: 很纤细的武器；远远比笨重的巨剑更加致命。

description.original: An experienced warrior can use a sword for defense as well as offense.
description.display: 对于经验丰富的战士来说，剑可攻击亦可防御。

description.original: Gifted to me by a Harpell of all people. One of the few sane ones.
description.display: 这是一位哈贝尔家族成员送给我的。也算是该家族中少数正常的人之一了。

description.original: An apt metaphor for myself, if I'm being introspective.
description.display: 如果要我自省的话，那这是对我很贴切的形容词。

description.original: Allows you to blend in with the stony crags and otherworldly fungi of the Underdark.
description.display: 可以让你完美融入幽暗地域的石壁和奇异菌类环境中。

name.display: 卓尔精灵巡林客的斗篷

description.original: There was a time I would have been thrilled to receive this cloak. Now I use it because I must.
description.display: 曾经我很憧憬拥有这样的斗篷，但现在我仅仅是因为形势所迫而使用它。

name.original: Hooded Cloak of the Faerûn Hero

description.original: Gifted to me by the Weeping Friars. Strange folk.
description.display: 这是哀泣修道会送给我的。那是一群很奇怪的人。

description.original: It would be better if you simply didn't get hit while wearing this.
description.display: 使用此护甲的秘诀就是别让敌人击中你。

description.original: A generic leather chest piece. Not much to note.
description.display: 常见的皮革胸甲。没什么特殊的。

name.display: 卓尔精灵巡林客的胸甲

description.original: Aids me in moving quickly and silently through most terrain.
description.display: 助我迅速潜行于任何环境和地形。

name.original: Chest Piece of the Lost Homeland

description.original: I miss my homeland some days, but I don't miss the pain and strife that consumes that place.
description.display: 有时候真的很想念家乡，但我也很厌恶笼罩着我家乡的痛苦与纷争。

description.original: A children's play-thing.
description.display: 孩童的玩物。

description.original: It has been painted black to resemble a more powerful artifact.
description.display: 涂上了一层黑色颜料以伪装出珍贵神器的模样。

description.original: Transforms into a black panther upon command. Not Guenhwyvar, though.
description.display: 可以随时听命变身为黑豹。只可惜并不能变成关海法。

description.original: A unique figurine that summons my faithful companion, Guenhwyvar.
description.display: 这个独特的小雕像可以召唤出我忠诚的伙伴关海法。

description.original: An apprentice's replica of a far more powerful artifact.
description.display: 学徒使用的仿造某件强大神器的赝品护符。

description.original: A simple charm engraved with a unicorn motif.
description.display: 雕刻着一只独角兽图案的简单护符。

description.original: Can be used to summon a faithful unicorn mount, if you are worthy.
description.display: 可以用来召唤出独角兽坐骑，前提是你得获得独角兽的认可。

description.original: The ruling council of Silverymoon granted me Andahar as gratitude for my service.
description.display: 银月城的统治议会将独角兽安达哈赠送给我作为嘉奖。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Despite his increasing fame (or infamy) across the Sword Coast North as a drow who dwells on the surface, is deadly in battle, fights with great agility and two enchanted scimitars, and can call on an onyx panther figurine of wondrous power to bring a battle companion to his side, Drizzt Do'Urden remains an enigma. Thoughtful and sensitive to others, Drizzt holds himself to the highest ideals but does not expect the same of others. Ever alert for treachery and danger, he speaks little but is apt to be polite (if terse) in his dealings. A perfectionist who yearns to be accepted into places and groups and to make friends widely, Drizzt is haunted by the danger he brings to those he befriends thanks to the scrutiny of Lolth and his other foes (notably the demon Errtu and the human Artemis Entreri). Those he meets see his manner as grim.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Drizzt is not unlocked with this skin. Drizzt can only be unlocked by completing Overdue Rendezvous - the first Variant of the Underdeep Cartography adventure in the A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 尽管在整个剑湾北部名声大噪（或者是声名狼藉），作为一个居住在地表的卓尔精灵，他在战斗中仍然无比致命。他依靠卓越的敏捷和两把魔法弯刀战斗，还能使用神奇的玛瑙豹雕像，将战斗伙伴召唤到他身边。崔斯特·杜垩登始终是个谜一样的人物，他深思熟虑，对别人很敏感，以最高的理想标准要求自己，但并不期望别人也这样做。他对背叛和危险总是保持警惕，在与人打交道时却很有礼貌（尽管话语简练）。崔斯特是个完美主义者，他渴望被地方和团体所接受，也希望能广交朋友。由于罗丝以及其他敌人（特别是恶魔厄图和人类阿尔忒弥斯·恩崔立）的监视，他给他的朋友们带来了危险，这使他感到不安。在他遇到的人看来，他始终严肃而冷酷。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士崔斯特不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“迟到的会合”——“剑湾之旅”战役中“水下制图法”冒险的第一个支线任务——才能解锁崔斯特。

original.description: Gifted to me by a Harpell of all people. One of the few sane ones.

display.name: 闪光
display.description: 这是一位哈贝尔家族成员送给我的。也算是该家族中少数正常的人之一了。

original.name: Tattered Cloak
original.description: An apt metaphor for myself, if I'm being introspective.

display.name: 破烂的斗篷
display.description: 如果要我自省的话，那这是对我很贴切的形容词。

original.name: Underdark Cloak
original.description: Allows you to blend in with the stony crags and otherworldly fungi of the Underdark.

display.name: 幽暗地域斗篷
display.description: 可以让你完美融入幽暗地域的石壁和奇异菌类环境中。

original.name: Drow Ranger's Cloak
original.description: There was a time I would have been thrilled to receive this cloak. Now I use it because I must.

display.name: 卓尔精灵巡林客的斗篷
display.description: 曾经我很憧憬拥有这样的斗篷，但现在我仅仅是因为形势所迫而使用它。

original.name: Hooded Cloak of the Faerûn Hero
original.description: Gifted to me by the Weeping Friars. Strange folk.

display.name: 费伦英雄的兜帽斗篷
display.description: 这是哀泣修道会送给我的。那是一群很奇怪的人。

original.name: Flimsy Chest Piece
original.description: It would be better if you simply didn't get hit while wearing this.

display.name: 薄弱的胸甲
display.description: 使用此护甲的秘诀就是别让敌人击中你。

original.name: Leather Chest Piece
original.description: A generic leather chest piece. Not much to note.

display.name: 皮革胸甲
display.description: 常见的皮革胸甲。没什么特殊的。

original.name: Drow Ranger's Chest Piece
original.description: Aids me in moving quickly and silently through most terrain.

display.name: 卓尔精灵巡林客的胸甲
display.description: 助我迅速潜行于任何环境和地形。

original.name: Chest Piece of the Lost Homeland
original.description: I miss my homeland some days, but I don't miss the pain and strife that consumes that place.

display.name: 失落家园之胸甲
display.description: 有时候真的很想念家乡，但我也很厌恶笼罩着我家乡的痛苦与纷争。

original.name: Panther Toy
original.description: A children's play-thing.

display.name: 豹子玩具
display.description: 孩童的玩物。

original.name: Tin Statue
original.description: It has been painted black to resemble a more powerful artifact.

display.name: 锡制雕像
display.description: 涂上了一层黑色颜料以伪装出珍贵神器的模样。

original.name: Onyx Figurine
original.description: Transforms into a black panther upon command. Not Guenhwyvar, though.

display.name: 缟玛瑙小雕像
display.description: 可以随时听命变身为黑豹。只可惜并不能变成关海法。

original.name: Figurine of Guenhwyvar
original.description: A unique figurine that summons my faithful companion, Guenhwyvar.

display.name: 关海法小雕像
display.description: 这个独特的小雕像可以召唤出我忠诚的伙伴关海法。

original.name: Steel Charm
original.description: An apprentice's replica of a far more powerful artifact.

display.name: 钢质幸运物
display.description: 学徒使用的仿造某件强大神器的赝品护符。

original.name: Engraved Charm
original.description: A simple charm engraved with a unicorn motif.

display.name: 雕刻幸运物
display.description: 雕刻着一只独角兽图案的简单护符。

original.name: Unicorn Necklace
original.description: Can be used to summon a faithful unicorn mount, if you are worthy.

display.name: 独角兽项链
display.description: 可以用来召唤出独角兽坐骑，前提是你得获得独角兽的认可。

original.name: Horn Charm of Mielikki
original.description: The ruling council of Silverymoon granted me Andahar as gratitude for my service.

display.name: 梅莉凯的长角幸运物
display.description: 银月城的统治议会将独角兽安达哈赠送给我作为嘉奖。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位敏捷大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
